description_long: This sculpture depicts two nude male figures engaged in a dynamic wrestling match, frozen in a moment of intense physical struggle. The upper figure is poised above, gripping the wrist of the lower figure while raising his other arm as if to strike or maintain balance. The lower figure is on his knees, one hand pressed to the textured base, his body twisted in resistance. Both figures are highly detailed, with defined musculature and expressive postures that convey movement and tension. The base is irregular and textured, resembling rough ground or earth, anchoring the figures in place. The entire piece is rendered in a smooth, white stone material, reminiscent of classical marble statuary.
description: A detailed white stone sculpture of two nude male figures wrestling, with one figure pinning the other to a textured base. The work captures dynamic movement and anatomical detail.
description_view_0: From this rear angle, the muscular back and legs of the upper figure are prominent, while the lower figure's bent posture and supporting arm are visible.
description_view_1: This view highlights the upper figure's raised arm and the facial expressions of both figures, emphasizing the struggle and interaction between them.
description_view_2: Seen from above, the entwined limbs and the spatial relationship between the two figures are clear, showcasing the complexity of their poses.
description_view_3: This side view focuses on the lower figure's crouched position and the upper figure's dominance, with both heads and torsos visible.
attribute_location_context: No specific setting or environment is visible; the sculpture appears isolated against a neutral background.
